articles.title: Bitcoin Daily Exchange Net Flows Shows Sell-Offs Have Not Subsided
articles.description: Bitcoin daily exchange net flows have been erratic for the last month, to say the least. This is due to the numerous swings between dumping and stacking being done by investors in the space, all of which have affected the price of the digital asset in their own way. However, the net flows have begun to find a balance and it is unfortunately not a positive one. Outflows Start To Dominate The...

articles.title: Polkadot: Is developer activity enough to save DOT from touching bottom
articles.description: Polkadot saw a massive dip in valuation during Q2 along with the broader crypto market. However, on-chain data suggested some rare positives. Network usage and developer activity on Polkadot continued to stay high even during the market crackdown. Mapping the dots correctly Polkadot’s performance in Q2 of 2022 has been documented in Messari’s “State of […]

articles.title: Celsius influencers push dubious ‘CEL short squeeze’ strategy
articles.description: Celsius influencers are shilling the idea of a CEL short squeeze. Here's why that's highly improbable and, above all, damaging. The post Celsius influencers push dubious ‘CEL short squeeze’ strategy appeared first on Protos.

articles.title: Celsius takes out $417 million in staked ether from Aave
articles.description: Celsius Network has reclaimed a large portion of its collateral deposits that were locked in decentralized finance (DeFi) applications.

articles.title: Playboy Heats Up The Metaverse By Building Mansion In The Sandbox
articles.description: Playboy’s iconic party mansion will soon have a groundbreaking ceremony that will set the stage for the lifestyle brand’s new mansion erected in the metaverse. Playboy announced Tuesday that it’s making a penetration into the metaverse with the construction of the “MetaMansion,” in tandem with The Sandbox – a virtual world where players can build, […]

articles.title: Uniswap liquidity provider hacked for $8 million in phishing attack
articles.description: On Monday, a hacker reportedly stole from a wallet that was believed to be a liquidity provider on Uniswap.

articles.title: Uniswap Users Lose Over $8M Worth of Ethereum in Massive Phishing Attack
articles.description: Some individuals using Uniswap V3 have suffered a phishing attack. The attacker has stolen over 7,500 ETH, worth about $8.1 million.
